case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCCLENDON, CHERI AS TO DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TIFFANY TIRTADINATA, DAUGHTER IN LAW TO CO-OWNER YOUNG AI CHUNG. FILED BY DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM NO APPEARANCE IS MADE BY PLAINTIFF. FILED BY DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-16-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHERI MCCLENDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED MAR-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC. PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON FAILED TO APPEAR AND DID NOT NOTIFY THE COURT SHE WOULD BE UNABLE TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) YOUNG AI CHUNG, CO-OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2022 BY DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF CHERI MCCLENDON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EBONY BEAUTY SUPPLY INC., REPRESENTED BY YOUNG AI CHUNG, CO-OWNER AND TIFFANY TIRTADINATA, DAUGHTER-IN-LAW ARE PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG HEARS TESTIMONY FROM TIFFANY TIRTADINATA. COURT STATES THAT A DEFAULT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ISSUED. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2022 - JUDGMENT. PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5-16-22.
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - CHERI MCCLENDON. MAILED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
